description_long: This rickshaw features a whimsical, colorful exterior with swirling patterns in blue, green, yellow, and pink, reminiscent of psychedelic or retro art. The front is equipped with two large wooden wheels and a boxy engine compartment, while the rear has a more modern, enclosed body with a white roof. The side windows are large and transparent, allowing visibility into the passenger area, which appears to have bench seating. The rear of the vehicle displays a decorative panel with the word 'TELEVISOR' and additional artistic motifs. The fenders are painted pink, contrasting with the wooden and painted metal body. The overall design blends vintage and playful elements, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A vibrantly painted, vintage-style rickshaw with a white roof, large wooden wheels in front, and colorful swirling patterns along the sides and rear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the boxy engine compartment, large wooden wheels, pink fenders, and a 'TELEVISOR' sign.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the swirling painted patterns, large side window, and the transition from wooden front to enclosed rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the decorative back panel, colorful motifs, and the enclosed passenger area with a white roof.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same swirling patterns, large window, and the wooden front section.
attribute_passenger_seating_arrangement: One rear bench seat, forward-facing, located in the enclosed passenger area.
